ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_records" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "linked_user" INTEGER /* Indicator if the data is linked to the current logged user */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Unique key for categorizing the data */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the data record, searchable in the search engine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data record, searchable in the search engine */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords related to the data, searchable in the search engine */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the data record */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data is private */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., document, image, video) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data file in bytes */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the actual data file stored in the cloud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data_editor, data_viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "locked_until" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the account will be unlocked after multiple failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_data_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link between data and user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the data is linked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the link */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the link is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_data_links_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_data_links_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_records ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the tag */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_tags" (
  "data_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between data and tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_records ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_index" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the search index */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "searchable_content" TEXT /* Combined content from title, description, and keywords for searching */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the index was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the index */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the index is active */,
  "search_score" REAL /* Relevance score for search results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_engine_index_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_records ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log entry was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the log entry is active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client that accessed the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_records ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between user and role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the association */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the association is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encryption_keys" (
  "key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the encryption key */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* The actual encryption key used to secure the data */,
  "key_type" TEXT /* Type of encryption algorithm used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the key was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the key */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the key is active */,
  "key_expiration" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when the key will expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encryption_keys_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data_records ("data_id")
)
